subcodes.first_line: O radiant orb of the horizon of God's love! Be thou neither sorrowful nor dismayed, neither let thy heart be grieved. Be thou, rather, filled with eagerness and passionate fervor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نیر افق محبت الله محزون مباش مغموم مباش دلخون مباش پرشوق و پرشور باش وقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
